name_en: Lion Dance of Asadachi Suwa Shrine
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance of Asadachi Suwa Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Asadachi. It was designated on 1970-06-03.

name_en: Takatama Theater
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Takatama theater. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Takatama. It was designated on 1970-06-03.

name_en: Koshiobara Archaeological Site
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the Koshiobara archaeological site. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located on the grounds of the Tsushimadai water purification plant at Uchidote 243-2, Takaoka. It was designated on 1974-05-30.

name_en: Reputed Grave Site of the Monk Komyokai
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the reputed grave site of the monk Komyokai. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Kurogamo. It was designated on 1980-09-17.

name_en: Precinct of the Kannon Hall of Kannonji Temple
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the precinct of the Kannon hall of Kannonji Temple. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Miyama. It was designated on 1981-09-01.

name_en: Site of the Main Enclosure of Ayukai Castle
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the site of the main enclosure of Ayukai Castle. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Ayukai. It was designated on 1984-01-11.

name_en: Kasamatsuyama Site (Sutra Mound)
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the Kasamatsuyama site, a sutra mound. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Juo. It was designated on 1986-01-16.

name_en: Ruins of Arato Castle
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the ruins of Arato Castle. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Aratokou. It was designated on 1989-04-05.

name_en: Site Behind Shomyoji Temple (Sutra Mound)
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site, the site behind Shomyoji Temple, a sutra mound. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Juo. It was designated on 1993-03-29.

name_en: Precinct Trees of Haguro Shrine
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the precinct trees of Haguro Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Yamaguchi. It was designated on 1971-10-02.

name_en: Great Cedar of Haguro Shrine
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the great cedar of Haguro Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Yamaguchi. It was designated on 1971-10-02.

name_en: Cedar of Suwa Shrine
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the cedar tree of Suwa Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Asadachi. It was designated on 1971-10-19.

name_en: Kaimochida Wetland
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument, the Kaimochida wetland. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shirataka Town, Yamagata Prefecture, located at Tochikubo. It was designated on 1982-07-20.

name_en: Main Hall of Kotai Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the main hall of Kotai Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1968-12-10.

name_en: Memorial Pagoda of the Abo Clan
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the memorial pagoda of the Abo clan. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1982-03-30.

name_en: Miniature Shrine of Amarume Hachiman Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the miniature shrine (kuden) of Amarume Hachiman Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1992-03-26.

name_en: Worship Hall of Amarume Hachiman Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of structures, the worship hall of Amarume Hachiman Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1992-03-26.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of painting, an ink-painting folding screen depicting the twelve devas, brushed by Ichihara Entaku on paper. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1968-12-10.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of painting, a colored painting of the Buddha's nirvana on paper. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1987-02-06.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of painting, a colored folding screen depicting pines and cranes on paper. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1994-08-01.

name_romaji: Shihon bokuga Sozan jutō zu (hoka nifuku) Kaihō Yūshō hitsu

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a bronze standing statue of Dainichi Nyorai. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1977-06-07.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a bronze statue of the monk Genno. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1982-02-04.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of sculpture, a wooden seated statue of Kokuzo Bosatsu. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1994-04-18.

description_en: A tangible cultural property in the field of crafts, a bronze mirror (kansu). It is a town-designated cultural property of Shonai Town, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1968-12-10.
